nasb.text: It is a perpetual statute throughout your generations in all your dwellings: you shall not eat any fat or any blood.’ ”

esv.text: It shall be a statute forever throughout your generations, in all your dwelling places, that you eat neither fat nor blood.”

cnv.text: 任何脂肪和血你們都不可吃。這是你們在一切住處一條世代永存的律例。”

ccb.text: 你们无论住在哪里，都不可吃脂肪和血，这是你们世代永远要遵守的条例。”
